name: Charcuterie Box Set Fig, Blue Cheese, Honey, Round Cracker 4pc Plush - Gigglescape™
description:
Give your child a fun new toy set for imaginative play with this Charcuterie Box Set from Gigglescape™. Featuring a soft plush construction, this charcuterie set includes a fig, blue cheese, honey and a round dark cracker. Recommended for ages 1 and up, this charcuterie box set makes a fun addition to the decor in their room as well as a fun toy.

Gigglescape™: Where play starts and discovery never ends.
